memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from English Baronies (Sanders) p 77
Lucy, who inherited one-quarter of the barony of Skelton, m. Marmaduke de Thweng d. 1282-4.

** from Weis' Ancestral Roots . . ., 8th Edition, 88:29 - daught …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy de Brus於1226年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓時，她的父親Sir Peter de Brus II37歲，母親Helewisa de Lancaster23歲。她於大約1250年與Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年3月29日在英國越可爾吉斯波洛享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy de Brus于1226年出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Peter de Brus II37岁，母亲Helewisa de Lancaster23岁。她于大约1250年与Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1282年3月29日在英国越可爾吉斯波洛享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

nameMeanings.name: de

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy de Brus was born in 1226, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Peter de Brus II, was 37 and her mother, Helewisa de Lancaster, was 23. She married Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle about 1250. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 29 March 1282, in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy de Brus est née en 1226, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter de Brus II, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Helewisa de Lancaster, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mars 1282, à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy de Brus 1226 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter de Brus II 37 und ihre Mutter Helewisa de Lancaster 23. Sie hat um 1250 Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. März 1282 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Brus è nata il nel 1226 nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Peter de Brus II, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Helewisa de Lancaster, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 marzo 1282, nel Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de Brusが1226年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Brus IIは37歳，母Helewisa de Lancasterは23歳であった。約1250年にSir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1282年3月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de Brus(이)가 1226년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter de Brus II(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewisa de Lancaster(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 3월 29일 영국 요르크실르 길스버루에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Brus nasceu em 1226, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter de Brus II, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Helewisa de Lancaster, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de março de 1282, em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ro.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy de Brus родилась в 1226 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Peter de Brus II было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewisa de Lancaster, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 29 марта 1282 г. в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle aproximadamente 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1282, en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
